commit.message:
LU-18667 kernel: new kernel [RHEL 10.0 6.12.0-55.37.1.el10_0]

This patch makes changes to support new RHEL 10.0 release
for Lustre client.

The patch also fixes lustre_rmmod to use "grep -E" instead of
egrep, which is obsolescent.

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el10.0 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el10.0 testgroup=full-dne-part-1

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el10.0 testgroup=full-dne-part-2

  clientdistro=el10.0 testgroup=full-dne-part-3
